hero.subtitle: Upload a lecture. Get smart notes, quizzes, and a personal AI tutor — instantly.

preview.tutorQuestion: "How do backpropagation gradients flow through a neural network?"

features.subtitle: Six powerful tools working together to deliver a premium, distraction-free learning experience.

aiTutor.title: AI Tutor
aiTutor.description: Your personal AI companion that adapts to your learning style, answers questions in real-time, and guides you through complex topics.

liveAnalytics.title: Live Analytics
liveAnalytics.description: Track your progress with precision. See your points, streaks, and skill mastery in real-time.

adaptiveQuizzes.title: Adaptive Quizzes
adaptiveQuizzes.description: Smart assessments that evolve with your knowledge. Wrong answers become learning opportunities, not setbacks.

professorCommand.title: For Instructors
professorCommand.description: Get a complete overview: upload lectures, track class performance, and deploy AI-powered insights.

secureVault.title: Secure Vault
secureVault.description: Your learning data is encrypted and protected. Enterprise-grade security with a privacy-first architecture.

universalAccess.title: Universal Access
universalAccess.description: Learn anywhere, on any device. Sync your progress seamlessly across platforms.

step1.title: Create Your Profile
step1.description: Set your learning goals, choose your path, and personalize your experience.

step2.title: Dive In
step2.description: Enter immersive lecture environments. Navigate slides, interact with content, and let AI guide you.

step3.title: Level Up
step3.description: Ask questions in real-time. Get personalized explanations, practice with adaptive quizzes, and build your skills.

step4.title: Track Progress
step4.description: Watch your progress grow. Earn points, maintain streaks, unlock achievements, and reach new levels.

professors.subtitle: Deploy courses, monitor student progress in real-time, and leverage AI to optimize learning outcomes. Your classroom, reimagined.
professors.bullet1: Upload lectures with intelligent PDF parsing
professors.bullet2: Real-time student engagement analytics with concept tracking
professors.bullet4: Grounded AI tutor restricted to lecture content

cta.subtitle: Join learners already transforming their study habits. Your AI tutor is standing by.

footer.tagline: Built for one thing: turning your lectures into knowledge that sticks. The tutor only answers from your course — nothing made up.
